prompt:
Create a Python file called solaris_lop.py that implements Houdini Solaris Python Script LOP code. This code runs inside Houdini's Solaris context where hou.pwd().editableStage() provides a USD stage to write to.

The script should:

1. Get the stage: stage = hou.pwd().editableStage()
2. Create a root Xform: /Scene (set as default prim)
3. Create /Scene/Ground — a UsdGeom.Mesh ground plane (quad: 4 points, 1 face)
4. Create /Scene/Hero — a UsdGeom.Xform with xformOp:translate at (0, 1, 0)
5. Create /Scene/Hero/Body — a UsdGeom.Mesh (simple cube: 8 points, 6 faces)
6. Create /Scene/Lighting/KeyLight — a UsdLux.DistantLight with intensity=50000 and xformOp:rotateXYZ at (-45, 30, 0)
7. Create /Scene/Lighting/FillLight — a UsdLux.DomeLight with intensity=500
8. Create /Scene/Materials/HeroMat — a UsdShade.Material with UsdPreviewSurface shader (diffuseColor=(0.8, 0.2, 0.1), roughness=0.4, metallic=0.0)
9. Bind HeroMat to /Scene/Hero/Body using UsdShade.MaterialBindingAPI
10. Apply UsdGeom.ModelAPI kind 'component' to /Scene/Hero

Use: from pxr import Usd, UsdGeom, UsdShade, UsdLux, Sdf, Gf, Kind
The hou module is provided — import it with 'import hou'
raw_output:
{"type":"step_start","timestamp":1775477909073,"sessionID":"ses_29d456bd1ffeUHnqcKuxq7VIJ3","part":{"id":"prt_d62bae650001QvJWdXYU5NZocG","sessionID":"ses_29d456bd1ffeUHnqcKuxq7VIJ3","messageID":"msg_d62ba981d001NQDR4rjZlAVvZe","type":"step-start"}}
{"type":"tool_use","timestamp":1775477925771,"sessionID":"ses_29d456bd1ffeUHnqcKuxq7VIJ3","part":{"id":"prt_d62bb24360018Hcx6YXyOrGDJI","sessionID":"ses_29d456bd1ffeUHnqcKuxq7VIJ3","messageID":"msg_d62ba981d001NQDR4rjZlAVvZe","type":"tool","callID":"call_5d96","tool":"write","state":{"status":"completed","input":{"content":"import hou
from pxr import Usd, UsdGeom, UsdShade, UsdLux, Sdf, Gf, Kind

def create_solaris_stage():
    stage = hou.pwd().editableStage()

    UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Scene").SetPrimPurpose(UsdGeom.Tokens.purposeDefault)

    ground_mesh = UsdGeom.Mesh.Define(stage, "/Scene/Ground")
    ground_mesh.CreatePurposeAttr(UsdGeom.Tokens.purposeDefault)
    ground_mesh.CreateDoubleSidedAttr(True)
    ground_mesh.CreateNormalsAttr()

    quad_points = [
        Gf.Vec3f(-10, 0, -10),
        Gf.Vec3f(-10, 0, 10),
        Gf.Vec3f(10, 0, 10),
        Gf.Vec3f(10, 0, -10)
    ]
    ground_mesh.CreatePointsAttr(quad_points)
    ground_mesh.CreateFaceVertexCountsAttr([4])

    hero_xform = UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Scene/Hero")
    hero_xform.SetTranslation(Gf.Vec3d(0, 1, 0))
    hero_xform.CreateXformOp('xformOp:translate', UsdGeom.XformCommonAPI.PurposeTransform)
    hero_xform.SetPrimPurpose(UsdGeom.Tokens.purposeDefault)

    hero_body = UsdGeom.Mesh.Define(stage, "/Scene/Hero/Body")
    hero_body.CreatePurposeAttr(UsdGeom.Tokens.purposeDefault)

    cube_points = [
        Gf.Vec3f(-1, -1, -1),
        Gf.Vec3f(-1, -1, 1),
        Gf.Vec3f(-1, 1, 1),
        Gf.Vec3f(-1, 1, -1),
        Gf.Vec3f(1, -1, -1),
        Gf.Vec3f(1, -1, 1),
        Gf.Vec3f(1, 1, 1),
        Gf.Vec3f(1, 1, -1)
    ]
    hero_body.CreatePointsAttr(cube_points)
    hero_body.CreateFaceVertexCountsAttr([4, 4, 4, 4, 4, 4])

    key_light = UsdLux.DistantLight.Define(stage, "/Scene/Lighting/KeyLight")
    key_light.CreateIntensityAttr(50000)
    key_light.CreateRotXAttr(-45)
    key_light.CreateRotYAttr(30)
    key_light.CreateRotZAttr(0)

    fill_light = UsdLux.DomeLight.Define(stage, "/Scene/Lighting/FillLight")
    fill_light.CreateIntensityAttr(500)

    hero_mat = UsdShade.Material.Define(stage, "/Scene/Materials/HeroMat")
    shader = UsdShade.Shader.Define(stage, "/Scene/Materials/HeroMat/Shader")
    shader.CreateIdAttr("UsdPreviewSurface")

    shader.CreateInput("diffuseColor", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Color3f).Set(Gf.Vec3f(0.8, 0.2, 0.1))
    shader.CreateInput("roughness", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Float).Set(0.4)
    shader.CreateInput("metallic", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Float).Set(0.0)

    binding_api = UsdShade.MaterialBindingAPI(hero_body)
    binding_api.Bind(hero_mat)

    hero_api = UsdGeom.ModelAPI(hero_xform)
    hero_api.SetKind(Kind.Tokens.component)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    create_solaris_stage()","filePath":"/private/var/folders/k0/jp_x85zj55nf3ssm76z3dmmh0000gn/T/llm-bench-jlp4a13k/solaris_lop.py"},"output":"Wrote file successfully.

{
  "content": "import hou
from pxr import Usd, UsdGeom, UsdShade, UsdLux, Sdf, Gf, Kind

def create_solaris_stage():
    stage = hou.pwd().editableStage()

    UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Scene").SetPrimPurpose(UsdGeom.Tokens.purposeDefault)

    ground_mesh = UsdGeom.Mesh.Define(stage, "/Scene/Ground")
    ground_mesh.CreatePurposeAttr(UsdGeom.Tokens.purposeDefault)
    ground_mesh.CreateDoubleSidedAttr(True)
    ground_mesh.CreateNormalsAttr()

    quad_points = [
        Gf.Vec3f(-10, 0, -10),
        Gf.Vec3f(-10, 0, 10),
        Gf.Vec3f(10, 0, 10),
        Gf.Vec3f(10, 0, -10)
    ]
    ground_mesh.CreatePointsAttr(quad_points)
    ground_mesh.CreateFaceVertexCountsAttr([4])

    hero_xform = UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Scene/Hero")
    hero_xform.SetTranslation(Gf.Vec3d(0, 1, 0))
    hero_xform.CreateXformOp('xformOp:translate', UsdGeom.XformCommonAPI.PurposeTransform)
    hero_xform.SetPrimPurpose(UsdGeom.Tokens.purposeDefault)

    hero_body = UsdGeom.Mesh.Define(stage, "/Scene/Hero/Body")
    hero_body.CreatePurposeAttr(UsdGeom.Tokens.purposeDefault)

    cube_points = [
        Gf.Vec3f(-1, -1, -1),
        Gf.Vec3f(-1, -1, 1),
        Gf.Vec3f(-1, 1, 1),
        Gf.Vec3f(-1, 1, -1),
        Gf.Vec3f(1, -1, -1),
        Gf.Vec3f(1, -1, 1),
        Gf.Vec3f(1, 1, 1),
        Gf.Vec3f(1, 1, -1)
    ]
    hero_body.CreatePointsAttr(cube_points)
    hero_body.CreateFaceVertexCountsAttr([4, 4, 4, 4, 4, 4])

    key_light = UsdLux.DistantLight.Define(stage, "/Scene/Lighting/KeyLight")
    key_light.CreateIntensityAttr(50000)
    key_light.CreateRotXAttr(-45)
    key_light.CreateRotYAttr(30)
    key_light.CreateRotZAttr(0)

    fill_light = UsdLux.DomeLight.Define(stage, "/Scene/Lighting/FillLight")
    fill_light.CreateIntensityAttr(500)

    hero_mat = UsdShade.Material.Define(stage, "/Scene/Materials/HeroMat")
    shader = UsdShade.Shader.Define(stage, "/Scene/Materials/HeroMat/Shader")
    shader.CreateIdAttr("UsdPreviewSurface")

    shader.CreateInput("diffuseColor", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Color3f).Set(Gf.Vec3f(0.8, 0.2, 0.1))
    shader.CreateInput("roughness", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Float).Set(0.4)
    shader.CreateInput("metallic", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Float).Set(0.0)

    binding_api = UsdShade.MaterialBindingAPI(hero_body)
    binding_api.Bind(hero_mat)

    hero_api = UsdGeom.ModelAPI(hero_xform)
    hero_api.SetKind(Kind.Tokens.component)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    create_solaris_stage()",

  "newString": "import hou
from pxr import Usd, UsdGeom, UsdShade, UsdLux, Sdf, Gf, Kind


def create_solaris_stage():
    stage = hou.pwd().editableStage()

    prim = UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Scene")
    UsdGeom.PurposeAPI(prim).SetPurpose(UsdGeom.Tokens.purposeDefault)

    ground_mesh_prim = UsdGeom.Mesh.Define(stage, "/Scene/Ground")
    UsdGeom.PurposeAPI(ground_mesh_prim).SetPurpose(UsdGeom.Tokens.purposeDefault)
    ground_mesh_prim.CreateDoubleSidedAttr(True)
    ground_mesh_prim.CreateNormalsAttr()

    quad_points = [
        Gf.Vec3f(-10, 0, -10),
        Gf.Vec3f(-10, 0, 10),
        Gf.Vec3f(10, 0, 10),
        Gf.Vec3f(10, 0, -10)
    ]
    ground_mesh_prim.CreatePointsAttr(quad_points)
    ground_mesh_prim.CreateFaceVertexCountsAttr([4])

    hero_xform_prim = UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Scene/Hero")
    xform_op = hero_xform_prim.AddTranslateOp()
    xform_op.Set(Gf.Vec3d(0, 1, 0))
    UsdGeom.PurposeAPI(hero_xform_prim).SetPurpose(UsdGeom.Tokens.purposeDefault)

    hero_body_prim = UsdGeom.Mesh.Define(stage, "/Scene/Hero/Body")
    UsdGeom.PurposeAPI(hero_body_prim).SetPurpose(UsdGeom.Tokens.purposeDefault)

    cube_points = [
        Gf.Vec3f(-1, -1, -1),
        Gf.Vec3f(-1, -1, 1),
        Gf.Vec3f(-1, 1, 1),
        Gf.Vec3f(-1, 1, -1),
        Gf.Vec3f(1, -1, -1),
        Gf.Vec3f(1, -1, 1),
        Gf.Vec3f(1, 1, 1),
        Gf.Vec3f(1, 1, -1)
    ]
    hero_body_prim.CreatePointsAttr(cube_points)
    hero_body_prim.CreateFaceVertexCountsAttr([4, 4, 4, 4, 4, 4])

    key_light_prim = UsdLux.DistantLight.Define(stage, "/Scene/Lighting/KeyLight")
    key_light_prim.CreateIntensityAttr(50000)
    key_light_prim.CreateRotXAttr(-45)
    key_light_prim.CreateRotYAttr(30)
    key_light_prim.CreateRotZAttr(0)

    fill_light_prim = UsdLux.DomeLight.Define(stage, "/Scene/Lighting/FillLight")
    fill_light_prim.CreateIntensityAttr(500)

    hero_mat_prim = UsdShade.Material.Define(stage, "/Scene/Materials/HeroMat")
    shader_prim = UsdShade.Shader.Define(stage, "/Scene/Materials/HeroMat/Shader")
    shader_prim.CreateIdAttr("UsdPreviewSurface")

    shader_prim.CreateInput("diffuseColor", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Color3f).Set(Gf.Vec3f(0.8, 0.2, 0.1))
    shader_prim.CreateInput("roughness", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Float).Set(0.4)
    shader_prim.CreateInput("metallic", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Float).Set(0.0)

    binding_api = UsdShade.MaterialBindingAPI(hero_body_prim)
    binding_api.Bind(hero_mat_prim)

    hero_api = UsdGeom.ModelAPI(hero_xform_prim)
    hero_api.SetKind(Kind.Tokens.component)"
}

  "newString": "import hou
from pxr import Usd, UsdGeom, UsdShade, UsdLux, Sdf, Gf, Kind


def create_solaris_stage():
    stage = hou.pwd().editableStage()

    root = UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Scene")
    UsdGeom.PurposeAPI(root).SetPurpose(UsdGeom.Tokens.purposeDefault)

    ground = UsdGeom.Mesh.Define(stage, "/Scene/Ground")
    UsdGeom.PurposeAPI(ground).SetPurpose(UsdGeom.Tokens.purposeDefault)
    ground.CreateDoubleSidedAttr(True)
    ground.CreateNormalsAttr()

    quad_points = [
        Gf.Vec3f(-10, 0, -10),
        Gf.Vec3f(-10, 0, 10),
        Gf.Vec3f(10, 0, 10),
        Gf.Vec3f(10, 0, -10)
    ]
    ground.CreatePointsAttr(quad_points)
    ground.CreateFaceVertexCountsAttr([4])

    hero = UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Scene/Hero")
    translate = hero.AddTranslateOp()
    translate.Set(Gf.Vec3d(0, 1, 0))
    UsdGeom.PurposeAPI(hero).SetPurpose(UsdGeom.Tokens.purposeDefault)

    body = UsdGeom.Mesh.Define(stage, "/Scene/Hero/Body")
    UsdGeom.PurposeAPI(body).SetPurpose(UsdGeom.Tokens.purposeDefault)

    cube_points = [
        Gf.Vec3f(-1, -1, -1),
        Gf.Vec3f(-1, -1, 1),
        Gf.Vec3f(-1, 1, 1),
        Gf.Vec3f(-1, 1, -1),
        Gf.Vec3f(1, -1, -1),
        Gf.Vec3f(1, -1, 1),
        Gf.Vec3f(1, 1, 1),
        Gf.Vec3f(1, 1, -1)
    ]
    body.CreatePointsAttr(cube_points)
    body.CreateFaceVertexCountsAttr([4, 4, 4, 4, 4, 4])

    key_light = UsdLux.DistantLight.Define(stage, "/Scene/Lighting/KeyLight")
    key_light.CreateIntensityAttr(50000)
    key_light.CreateRotXAttr(-45)
    key_light.CreateRotYAttr(30)
    key_light.CreateRotZAttr(0)

    fill_light = UsdLux.DomeLight.Define(stage, "/Scene/Lighting/FillLight")
    fill_light.CreateIntensityAttr(500)

    mat = UsdShade.Material.Define(stage, "/Scene/Materials/HeroMat")
    shader = UsdShade.Shader.Define(stage, "/Scene/Materials/HeroMat/Shader")
    shader.CreateIdAttr("UsdPreviewSurface")

    shader.CreateInput("diffuseColor", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Color3f).Set(Gf.Vec3f(0.8, 0.2, 0.1))
    shader.CreateInput("roughness", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Float).Set(0.4)
    shader.CreateInput("metallic", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Float).Set(0.0)

    binding = UsdShade.MaterialBindingAPI(body)
    binding.Bind(mat)

    model = UsdGeom.ModelAPI(hero)
    model.SetKind(Kind.Tokens.component)"
}

files.content:
"""Mock Houdini hou module for Solaris/LOP testing.

Key difference from SOP mock: pwd().editableStage() returns a real
Usd.Stage.CreateInMemory() so validators can inspect actual USD content.
"""
from pxr import Usd

_STAGE = Usd.Stage.CreateInMemory()
_CALL_LOG = []


class _MockPwd:
    """Mock for the current node (hou.pwd()) in a Python Script LOP."""

    def editableStage(self):
        _CALL_LOG.append(("editableStage",))
        return _STAGE


_PWD = _MockPwd()


def pwd():
    """Return the current node mock (provides editableStage())."""
    return _PWD


def _get_stage():
    """Return the USD stage for validation."""
    return _STAGE


def _get_call_log():
    """Return recorded call log."""
    return list(_CALL_LOG)

"""Solaris mock internals — minimal since the real work happens on the USD stage."""
# The Solaris mock is intentionally thin.
# All state lives on the real Usd.Stage returned by editableStage().
# This file exists for structural consistency with the SOP mock.

import hou
from pxr import Usd, UsdGeom, UsdShade, UsdLux, Sdf, Gf, Kind


def create_solaris_stage():
    stage = hou.pwd().editableStage()

    root = UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Scene")
    UsdGeom.PurposeAPI(root).SetPurpose(UsdGeom.Tokens.purposeDefault)

    ground = UsdGeom.Mesh.Define(stage, "/Scene/Ground")
    UsdGeom.PurposeAPI(ground).SetPurpose(UsdGeom.Tokens.purposeDefault)
    ground.CreateDoubleSidedAttr(True)
    ground.CreateNormalsAttr()

    quad_points = [
        Gf.Vec3f(-10, 0, -10),
        Gf.Vec3f(-10, 0, 10),
        Gf.Vec3f(10, 0, 10),
        Gf.Vec3f(10, 0, -10),
    ]
    ground.CreatePointsAttr(quad_points)
    ground.CreateFaceVertexCountsAttr([4])

    hero = UsdGeom.Xform.Define(stage, "/Scene/Hero")
    translate = hero.AddTranslateOp()
    translate.Set(Gf.Vec3d(0, 1, 0))
    UsdGeom.PurposeAPI(hero).SetPurpose(UsdGeom.Tokens.purposeDefault)

    body = UsdGeom.Mesh.Define(stage, "/Scene/Hero/Body")
    UsdGeom.PurposeAPI(body).SetPurpose(UsdGeom.Tokens.purposeDefault)

    cube_points = [
        Gf.Vec3f(-1, -1, -1),
        Gf.Vec3f(-1, -1, 1),
        Gf.Vec3f(-1, 1, 1),
        Gf.Vec3f(-1, 1, -1),
        Gf.Vec3f(1, -1, -1),
        Gf.Vec3f(1, -1, 1),
        Gf.Vec3f(1, 1, 1),
        Gf.Vec3f(1, 1, -1),
    ]
    body.CreatePointsAttr(cube_points)
    body.CreateFaceVertexCountsAttr([4, 4, 4, 4, 4, 4])

    key_light = UsdLux.DistantLight.Define(stage, "/Scene/Lighting/KeyLight")
    key_light.CreateIntensityAttr(50000)
    key_light.CreateRotXAttr(-45)
    key_light.CreateRotYAttr(30)
    key_light.CreateRotZAttr(0)

    fill_light = UsdLux.DomeLight.Define(stage, "/Scene/Lighting/FillLight")
    fill_light.CreateIntensityAttr(500)

    mat = UsdShade.Material.Define(stage, "/Scene/Materials/HeroMat")
    shader = UsdShade.Shader.Define(stage, "/Scene/Materials/HeroMat/Shader")
    shader.CreateIdAttr("UsdPreviewSurface")

    shader.CreateInput("diffuseColor", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Color3f).Set(
        Gf.Vec3f(0.8, 0.2, 0.1)
    )
    shader.CreateInput("roughness", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Float).Set(0.4)
    shader.CreateInput("metallic", Sdf.ValueTypeNames.Float).Set(0.0)

    binding = UsdShade.MaterialBindingAPI(body)
    binding.Bind(mat)

    model = UsdGeom.ModelAPI(hero)
    model.SetKind(Kind.Tokens.component)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    create_solaris_stage()
